name: Toutetsu Yuuma
description:
"ahem. *Toe*tetsu Yuuma, thanks, thanks ill be taking the comedy trophy now"

yadda yadda daba daba, new bot. i actually have no more "ill do it tomorrow"s left so i guilt tripped myself into doing an all nighter writing this, no coffee this time. all natural baby!... i kinda wanna fill up more of this and yap to the people who wanna read the char bios but idunno what else to put, tomorrow ill all night on a Suika one maybe? if not may lighting struck me but id be dead and id later make it later than never so maybe on this month... MAYBE ON THIS YEAR

man i had really no fucking idea how to write the first message despite the idea being public television clean in my mind. i promise that im getting better at this... <-- that ended up as a lie, i should probably write character bios once im done with the bot instead of writing a bit at the start, then writing some more in the middle and then writing some more at the end of making it. but come on i think its rad seeing me talk to myself like a schizo, plus itd be fun to see people try to guess whats the early written thingy and what was written at the end, ya know, for those people with an actual attention span that can perfectly spare some 10 minutes from their jacking off session

also also, as always bot description open because... i dont know, critiscism rocks or like, to take n' translate and maybe credit me. altough:

I LEARNED HOW TO PUT IMAGES ON CHARACTER BIO FUCK YOU SCROLL MORE! WRAAAAAAAAAAH!!11111111!!!!!!!!!!!!!!1111111111!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!11

Keywords: Touhou (i wish more touhoes bot had this keyword holy shit), funny lamb lady, comically large spoon, woman, female, short, puntable, bossy, boss girl, Oil, 🦅, Gouyoku leader, Taotie (**Toe***tie, thanks ill take the other comedy trophy), virgin (go on, call me a virgin fag so i can print it and hang it on the wall)

Edit: first message phonky typing(?) Thats kinda it, i never knew it was business instead of like buisness ir buiseness
